allow: Bash(python -X utf8 -c "import json;f=open\('dicts/occupation_skill_dictionary_v2.4.json','r',encoding='utf-8'\);data=json.load\(f\);f.close\(\);skills=data['skills'];print\(f'Total skills: {len\(skills\)}'\);from collections import Counter;names=[s['name'] for s in skills];dupes=[\(n,c\) for n,c in Counter\(names\).items\(\) if c>1];print\(f'Exact duplicate names: {len\(dupes\)}'\);[print\(f'  {n} x{c}'\) for n,c in dupes[:10]];types=Counter\(s.get\('skill_type',''\) for s in skills\);print\(f'Skill types:'\);[print\(f'  {t}: {c}'\) for t,c in types.most_common\(\)];wa=sum\(1 for s in skills if s.get\('aliases'\)\);print\(f'With aliases: {wa}'\);ta=sum\(len\(s.get\('aliases',[]\)\) for s in skills\);print\(f'Total aliases: {ta}'\)")
